name: Rocks
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Figs, Raisins or Dates, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together sifted flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cloves, and cinnamon.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with sour milk, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
5. Stir in chopped nuts and dried fruit until just combined.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Grease a baking sheet and pour the batter by teaspoonfuls onto the prepared surface.
8. Bake for about 12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and serve.
